BROPHY CHRISTENSEN, JR.'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 12, 2020 AT 9:30 A.M. THE COURT UNDERSTANDS THAT THE BRITISH COLUMBIA COURT IS SCHEDULED TO HEAR PLAINTIFF TILT HOLDINGS, INC.'S FORUM NON CONVENIENS MOTION ON OCTOBER 29. IN THE INTEREST OF COMITY, AND IN ORDER TO AVOID POTENTIALLY INCONSISTENT RULINGS, THE COURT BELIEVES THAT A BRIEF CONTINUANCE OF THE HEARING ON THE INSTANT MOTION IS WARRANTED. THE PARTIES SHALL INFORM THE COURT IN WRITING PRIOR TO THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE OF ANY RULING BY THE BRITISH COLUMBIA COURT. NO FURTHER BRIEFS SHALL BE FILED. THE COURT GRANTS AN INTERIM STAY OF ALL PROCEEDINGS IN THIS ACTION PENDING THE CONTINUED HEARING. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
